nasb.text: So may he live, and may the gold of Sheba be given to him; And let them pray for him continually; Let them bless him all day long.

esv.text: Long may he live; may gold of Sheba be given to him! May prayer be made for him continually, and blessings invoked for him all the day!

cnv.text: 願他長久活著， 願人把示巴的金子奉給他， 願人為他不住禱告， 終日給他祝福。

ccb.text: 愿王寿命长久， 愿人们将示巴的金子献给他， 不断为他祷告， 终日称颂他。

csbs.text: 愿他长寿！愿人把示巴的金子献给他； 愿人一直为他祷告，终日祝福他。
